title: Aam ka Achaar (Version 2)
description: A smaller-batch spicy mango pickle with fennel, nigella, carom, fenugreek, and mustard oil.
steps: Wash and completely dry the mangoes, cube them, then sun-dry for a few hours.
Dry-roast fenugreek, cool, and coarsely grind with mustard seeds. Mix with the remaining dry spices and salt.
Toss the mango pieces thoroughly with the spice mixture.
Heat mustard oil to smoking point, cool completely, and pour over the mangoes until covered.
Transfer to a clean dry glass jar and rest for 3–5 days, shaking daily.
notes: Keep all utensils and mangoes moisture-free to prevent spoilage.
Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
